text:
On Tue, 7 Aug 2007 23:41:09 UT
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of mail/p5-qpsmtpd,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/115272 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/115272
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

Already been fixed by some one else. Just cvsup to the newest ports.
